title: Bottle Wine Bag with Handles Bulk 12 Packs, Premium Paper Gift Bag Assorted Design, Single Wine Carry Bag, Perfect for Housewarming, Birthday, Anniversary, Wedding, Dinner Party
features: Anzon Mories Good Value Pack: Includes 12 wine bags with tough matte finished lamination, total with 6 colors: Gold, Silver, Cream, Sky-blue, Pink, Orange. 2 bags of each color. Suitable for DIY Writing and Drawing. TIP: Push your hand into the bag to open fully before putting bottle in!
Dimensions: 13.7 x 4.5 x 3.5 inches, each carry bag hold a single wine bottle or champagne bottle 750ML-1.5L. Each paper bag can hold up to 8 pounds/3.5 kg.
Quality: 110lb / 300gsm thickness cardboard paper with matte lamination, heavy duty paper material: Each bag has a soft durable ribbon handle: Make sure your precious gift bottle safe and secure.

Versatile: suitable for any events & festivals, such as Christmas, Thanksgiving, Birthday, Home Dinner Party, Housewarming, New Year, Graduation, Business Presents, Wedding, Anniversary, Bachelorette, Engagement & Baby Shower.
description: Colorful Paper Wine Bags 12 Value Pack. Best Quality for liquor / alcohol bottle bag, Large Size good with Whiskey, Vodka, champagne 750ml – 1500ml. Each bag can hold up to 8 pounds glass bottle. Durable Material: Secure and Safety for you precious gift Specification: Packing list: 12pcs/pack Material: 300gsm high quality cardboard paper and soft ribbon handle Colors: Gold, Silver, Cream, Sky-blue, Orange, Pink Size: 13.7 x 4.5 x 3.5 inches / 34.5 x 11.4 x 8.8 cm
